title: PRD Phase State
description: Cross-session polish state for /dev-prd. Written to .loop/prd/state.json. Main skill owns this file; subagents MUST NOT touch.

status.description: Current stage. researching: Step 1.5 GH+Web scan. scoping: Step 1.6 user scope confirmation. drafting: Step 2-2.5 initial 3-view fan-out + synthesis. polishing: Step 5.5 refinement loop. done: user has confirmed 定稿.

iterations.description: Every polish round appends an entry. Initial synthesis counts as iteration 0.

kind.description: initial: first synthesis. refine-section: user targeted one PRD section. refine-view: user targeted one of the 3 views. refine-all: full re-synthesis.

userFeedback.description: Verbatim user feedback text that triggered this iteration

sections.description: PRD sections touched (e.g. '## 用户价值', '## 商业闭环')

lockedSections.description: PRD sections the user has confirmed final; polish rounds MUST NOT touch these

userConfirmedDone.description: Only true after user explicitly says 定稿. Setting true is the trigger to advance currentPhase to 'prototype'.
